main.description: An attachment providing commentary, context, evidence, or documentary material related to a hypercert record (e.g. an activity, project, claim, or evaluation). Attachments may support, clarify, or challenge the referenced subject.

subjects.description: References to the subject(s) the attachment is connected to—this may be an activity claim, outcome claim, measurement, evaluation, or even another attachment. This is optional as the attachment can exist before the claim is recorded.

attachmentType.description: The type of attachment, e.g. report, audit, evidence, testimonial, methodology, etc.

relationType.description: How this attachment relates to the subject. If omitted, the attachment is not asserting a specific relationship.

contributors.description: List of contributors to this attachment with optional relative weights. If omitted, `weight` defaults to 1. For richer semantics, use separate contribution records.

shortDescription.description: Short summary of this attachment, suitable for previews and list views. Rich text annotations may be provided via `shortDescriptionFacets`.

shortDescriptionFacets.description: Rich text annotations for `shortDescription` (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc).

description.description: Optional longer description of this attachment, including context or interpretation. Rich text annotations may be provided via `descriptionFacets`.

descriptionFacets.description: Rich text annotations for `description` (mentions, URLs, hashtags, etc).

content.description: The files, documents, or external references included in this attachment record.

locations.description: Optional geographic references that this attachment relates to. Each referenced record must conform with the app.certified.location lexicon.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
